tools.name: generate_variant_clinical_report
tools.description: Aggregate Ensembl VEP, ClinVar, gnomAD, AlphaMissense, and AlphaFold structural context for a single variant. Returns a draft ACMG/AMP evidence surface (not a validated clinical classification).

tools.name: classify_variant_acmg
tools.description: Map upstream evidence onto the 2015 Richards et al. ACMG criteria. The mapping is implemented from the published guidelines but has NOT been reviewed by a clinical geneticist.
